title: MCUExtension
description: Category extension for microcontrollers — catalog tier (identity-level facts: core, memory, peripheral counts, package, supply, debug interface, reset pin, temperature grades). Per-peripheral instance and pin-mux detail is Tier 2, deferred to v1.5 (mcu_peripherals.schema.json). Layered on top of base per spec §7. Version 1.0. Field union from ATmega328P-AU (Atmel/Microchip 8-bit AVR, TQFP-32, 32K flash) + STM32F103C8T6 (ST Cortex-M3 32-bit, LQFP-48, 64K flash).

core_family.description: CPU core family identifier. Open string — not an enum — to accommodate future cores. Examples: 'cortex_m0', 'cortex_m0plus', 'cortex_m3', 'cortex_m4', 'cortex_m4f', 'cortex_m7', 'cortex_m33', 'avr_8bit', 'avr_8bit_atmega', 'avr_8bit_attiny', 'pic16', 'pic32', 'riscv_rv32', '8051', 'mips'. Always lowercase with underscores.

core_speed_max.description: Maximum CPU clock frequency in Hz. Plain integer — NOT a SpecValue list (single-point spec, no min/typ spread). Store MHz as Hz (e.g. 72MHz → 72000000). Null when not determinable.

flash_size.description: Internal flash memory size in bytes. Plain integer. Store KB as bytes (e.g. 32K → 32768, 64K → 65536). Null when no internal flash (e.g. external-flash-only parts).

ram_size.description: Internal SRAM size in bytes. Plain integer. Store KB as bytes (e.g. 20K → 20480). Null when not determinable.

eeprom_size.description: Internal EEPROM size in bytes. 0 when the part has no EEPROM (e.g. most Cortex-M parts). Null when not determinable. For AVR parts with EEPROM, store actual byte count (e.g. ATmega328P 1K EEPROM → 1024).

pin_count.description: Total package pin count. Plain integer. Null when the part is sold in multiple packages and the target package is unknown.

gpio_count.description: Number of general-purpose I/O pins (GPIO). Plain integer. Null when not determinable.

nvic_priorities.description: Number of Cortex-M NVIC interrupt priority levels. For Cortex-M3: 16 levels (4-bit priority field). Null for non-Cortex-M cores (AVR, PIC, 8051, classic RISC-V without NVIC).

vdd_range.description: Main power supply voltage range (unit: V). For most MCUs this is VDD or VCC. Condition carries operating frequency dependencies when relevant (e.g. AVR 20MHz requires 4.5–5.5V).

vddio_range.description: Separate I/O supply voltage range (unit: V), when the I/O power domain is independent of VDD. Null when I/O supply is shared with VDD (most single-supply MCUs).

vdda_range.description: Analog supply voltage range (unit: V) for ADC/DAC/PLL supplies (AVCC, VDDA, AVDD). Null when analog supply is shared with VDD and no separate spec is given.

peripheral_counts.description: Peripheral instance counts. Catalog tier only — captures HOW MANY of each peripheral, not per-peripheral configuration. Use 0 for peripherals the part lacks (not null). Per-instance pin-mux and configuration is Tier 2 (mcu_peripherals.schema.json, deferred to v1.5).

uart.description: Number of UART/USART interfaces. Count each independent channel.

can.description: Number of CAN interfaces. 0 for most low-end MCUs.

usb.description: Number of USB interfaces. Count peripheral instances, not endpoints.

ethernet.description: Number of Ethernet MAC interfaces. 0 for most MCUs without on-chip MAC.

dac.description: Number of DAC peripheral instances (NOT channel count). 0 when no DAC is present.

timer_general.description: Number of general-purpose timer instances (basic + general timers; exclude advanced-control timers).

timer_advanced.description: Number of advanced-control timer instances (with complementary PWM outputs, dead-time, etc.).

adc.description: ADC overall summary — catalog tier (single summary covering all ADC channels on the part, not per-peripheral detail). Null when the part has no ADC. Per-ADC instance configuration is Tier 2.

bit_depth.description: ADC resolution in bits (e.g. 10, 12, 16). Null when not determinable.

channel_count.description: Total number of ADC input channels (all muxed channels combined across all ADC peripherals). Null when not determinable.

sample_rate_max_hz.description: Maximum sample rate in Hz across all ADC channels (e.g. 76900 for ATmega at 76.9 ksps, 1000000 for STM32 at 1 MSPS). Null when not determinable.

dac.description: DAC overall summary — catalog tier. Null when the part has no DAC (set peripheral_counts.dac=0 in that case). Per-DAC instance configuration is Tier 2.

bit_depth.description: DAC resolution in bits (e.g. 8, 10, 12). Null when not determinable.

channel_count.description: Total number of DAC output channels. Null when not determinable.

sample_rate_max_hz.description: Maximum DAC update rate in Hz. Null when not determinable.

boot_pins.description: Boot configuration pins (BOOT0, BOOT1, etc.) that control startup mode. Empty array when the part has no boot pins (e.g. AVR uses fuse-controlled boot section, not a pin). Null when not determinable.

function.description: Boot pin function label from the datasheet (e.g. 'BOOT0', 'BOOT1').

debug_interface.description: Primary debug/programming interface. swd_jtag for Cortex-M parts supporting both SWD and JTAG. debugwire for AVR parts with debugWIRE. pdi for XMEGA. spi_isp for older AVR/PIC parts programmed via SPI. none for parts without on-chip debug.

reset_pin.description: RESET/NRST pin number string (matches base.pinout[*].numbers). Null when not determinable or when the part has no dedicated reset pin. For ATmega328P-AU TQFP-32: '29'. For STM32F103C8T6 LQFP-48: '7'.

temperature_grades.description: Operating temperature grade strings from the datasheet. Free-form, e.g. 'commercial: 0 to +70', 'industrial: -40 to +85', 'automotive: -40 to +125'. Multiple entries when a part has multiple grades.

thermal_resistance.description: Thermal resistance characteristics. Null when not published in the datasheet. Inner fields follow the diode/transistor/opamp convention.

rtheta_ja.description: Junction-to-ambient thermal resistance (K/W or °C/W). Condition may specify board and copper area conditions.

rtheta_jc.description: Junction-to-case thermal resistance (K/W or °C/W). Null when not specified.

rtheta_jl.description: Junction-to-lead thermal resistance (K/W or °C/W). Common for some SMD packages. Null for most MCU packages.

package.description: Package physical characteristics. body_mm uses nested object shape (Phase 3b option A convention — inner keys align with base.schema.json body_mm shape).

pitch_mm.description: Lead pitch in millimeters. Null when not applicable (e.g. BGA).

body_mm.description: Package body dimensions in millimeters. Nested object per Phase 3b option A convention. Inner keys (length/width/height) align with base.schema.json's body_mm shape.

length.description: Body length in millimeters along the longest axis.

width.description: Body width in millimeters along the perpendicular-to-length axis.

height.description: Body height in millimeters (package thickness / standoff direction).

thermal_pad.description: True when the package has an exposed thermal pad on the bottom (common for QFN). Null when not determinable.
